response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptional software engineer with 16+ years of experience and strong architectural acumen, his profile is fundamentally misaligned with the role's core requirements. His C++ experience is minimal (6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015) and absent from his current skills. He lacks industrial/embedded systems background, IoT domain knowledge, and critical security standards expertise (IEC 62443, SDL practices). His career trajectory over the last decade focused on web backends and TypeScript/Node.js infrastructure—moving away from systems programming. For a Senior C++ Manager role in industrial automation, this candidate represents significant technical risk and would require extensive ramp-up on the core domain.
strengths: Extensive engineering maturity (16+ years) with proven ability to architect large-scale, event-driven distributed systems
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and demonstrated mentoring capability
Cross-functional expertise across multiple languages and domains showing adaptability and problem-solving depth
concerns: C++ expertise is minimal and outdated (6 months in 2014-2015); currently focused on TypeScript/Node.js with no recent systems programming
No background in industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, IEC standards), or industrial cybersecurity
Security standards expertise (IEC 62443, SDL practices) completely absent; career has no exposure to regulated, safety-critical development

key_factors.factor: Industrial domain and cybersecurity standards knowledge
Software architecture and distributed systems maturity
